name: CLI Bridge
description: Docker-first command entry plane for OpenClaw-compatible local CLI execution
author: AliceLJY

apiToken.description: Task API auth token (from openclaw-worker config)

callbackChannel.description: Callback channel ID where CLI results are delivered

callbackBotToken.description: Bot token used for callback delivery when the worker needs to post results back through a bot identity

sessionStorePath.description: Path to persist CLI Bridge session mappings in SQLite across plugin restarts
